mapper.sql:
FROM( SELECT A.AH_IP AS IP , AH_REFERER AS REFERER , AH_BROWSER AS BROWSER , AH_OS AS OS , LEFT(AH_DATE,19) DAYTIME FROM (
) A )AA WHERE 1=1
AND IP LIKE CONCAT('%',#{item.searchKeyword},'%')
AND REFERER LIKE CONCAT('%',#{item.searchKeyword},'%')
AND BROWSER LIKE CONCAT('%',#{item.searchKeyword},'%')
AND OS LIKE CONCAT('%',#{item.searchKeyword},'%')
AND DAYTIME LIKE CONCAT('%',#{item.searchKeyword},'%')
AND ( IP LIKE CONCAT('%',#{item.searchKeyword},'%') OR REFERER LIKE CONCAT('%',#{item.searchKeyword},'%') OR BROWSER LIKE CONCAT('%',#{item.searchKeyword},'%') OR OS LIKE CONCAT('%',#{item.searchKeyword},'%') OR DAYTIME LIKE CONCAT('%',#{item.searchKeyword},'%') )
mapper.select:
SELECT IF(AH_REFERER !='', SUBSTRING_INDEX(SUBSTRING_INDEX(AH_REFERER, '/', 3),'://', -1), '직접입력') AS CONTENT , COUNT(*) as COUNT FROM (
) A GROUP BY CONTENT
ORDER BY COUNT DESC
ORDER BY CONTENT

SELECT AH_BROWSER AS CONTENT , COUNT(*) AS COUNT FROM (
) AA GROUP BY CONTENT
ORDER BY COUNT DESC
ORDER BY CONTENT

SELECT AH_OS AS CONTENT , COUNT(*) AS COUNT FROM (
) AA GROUP BY CONTENT
ORDER BY COUNT DESC
ORDER BY CONTENT

SELECT SC_CODENM AS CONTENT , IFNULL(COUNT,0) AS COUNT FROM s_common_code_sub CB LEFT JOIN ( SELECT SUBSTR(AH_DATE,12,2) TIME , COUNT(*) COUNT FROM (
) A GROUP BY TIME ORDER BY TIME ) B ON CB.SC_CODENM = B.TIME WHERE SC_MC_IN_C = 'AS'
ORDER BY COUNT DESC
ORDER BY SC_CODELV

SELECT SC_CODENM AS CONTENT , IFNULL(COUNT,0) AS COUNT FROM s_common_code_sub CB LEFT JOIN ( SELECT SUBSTR( _UTF8'일월화수목금토', DAYOFWEEK(AH_DATE), 1) AS DAYOFWEEK , COUNT(*) AS COUNT FROM (
) A GROUP BY DAYOFWEEK ORDER BY 1 ) B ON CB.SC_CODENM = B.DAYOFWEEK WHERE SC_MC_IN_C = 'AR'
ORDER BY COUNT DESC
ORDER BY SC_CODELV

SELECT LEFT(AH_DATE,10) CONTENT , COUNT(*) COUNT FROM (
) A GROUP BY CONTENT
ORDER BY COUNT DESC
ORDER BY CONTENT DESC

SELECT SUBSTR(AH_DATE, 1,7) CONTENT , COUNT(*) COUNT FROM (
) A GROUP BY CONTENT
ORDER BY COUNT DESC
ORDER BY CONTENT DESC

SELECT LEFT(AH_DATE,4) CONTENT , COUNT(*) COUNT FROM (
) A GROUP BY CONTENT
ORDER BY COUNT DESC
ORDER BY CONTENT DESC

SELECT AH.*, COUNT(*) selectCount FROM ( SELECT A.AH_KEYNO , B.MN_KEYNO , CASE WHEN B.MN_LEV = '0' THEN '메인페이지' ELSE B.MN_NAME END MN_NAME , C.MN_NAME MN_HOMEDIV_NAME , B.MN_HOMEDIV_C FROM t_activity_history A LEFT JOIN s_menu_manager B ON A.AH_MENU = B.MN_KEYNO LEFT JOIN s_menu_manager C ON B.MN_HOMEDIV_C = C.MN_KEYNO WHERE 1=1
AND AH_OS != 'searchbot'
AND C.MN_HOMEDIV_C = #{HOME_DIV}
AND B.MN_KEYNO IS NOT NULL AND A.AH_SESSION IS NOT NULL
AND AH_DEVICE = 'P'
AND AH_DEVICE != 'P'
AND date_format(AH_DATE,'%Y-%m-%d') >= date_format(#{STDT},'%Y-%m-%d')
AND date_format(AH_DATE,'%Y-%m-%d') <= date_format(#{ENDT},'%Y-%m-%d')
GROUP BY B.MN_KEYNO, A.AH_SESSION
GROUP BY B.MN_KEYNO, A.AH_DEVICE, A.AH_SESSION
) AH GROUP BY MN_KEYNO ORDER BY selectCount DESC;

SELECT AH.*, COUNT(*) COUNT FROM ( SELECT A.AH_KEYNO , B.MN_KEYNO , CASE WHEN B.MN_LEV = '0' THEN '메인페이지' ELSE B.MN_NAME END MN_NAME , C.MN_NAME MN_HOMEDIV_NAME , B.MN_HOMEDIV_C FROM t_activity_history A LEFT JOIN s_menu_manager B ON A.AH_MENU = B.MN_KEYNO LEFT JOIN s_menu_manager C ON B.MN_HOMEDIV_C = C.MN_KEYNO WHERE 1=1 AND AH_OS != 'searchbot' AND B.MN_KEYNO IS NOT NULL AND A.AH_SESSION IS NOT NULL
AND date_format(AH_DATE,'%Y-%M-%d') >= date_format(#{STDT},'%Y-%M-%d')
AND date_format(AH_DATE,'%Y-%M-%d') <= date_format(#{ENDT},'%Y-%M-%d')
GROUP BY B.MN_KEYNO, A.AH_SESSION ) AH GROUP BY MN_KEYNO ORDER BY COUNT DESC LIMIT 5

SELECT HM.HM_TILES, COUNT(*) AS CNT FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT AH_HOMEDIV_C, AH_SESSION FROM t_activity_history WHERE AH_OS <> 'searchbot' ) X JOIN s_home_manager HM ON X.AH_HOMEDIV_C = HM.HM_MN_HOMEDIV_C WHERE HM.HM_USE_YN = 'Y' AND HM.HM_MAIN_HOME <> 'A' GROUP BY HM.HM_TILES;

SELECT HM.HM_TILES, COUNT(DISTINCT CONCAT(T.AH_SESSION, '_', T.AH_HOMEDIV_C)) AS CNT FROM t_activity_history T INNER JOIN s_home_manager HM ON T.AH_HOMEDIV_C = HM.HM_MN_HOMEDIV_C WHERE T.AH_OS != 'searchbot' AND T.AH_HOMEDIV_C IS NOT NULL
AND T.AH_DATE >= CURDATE() AND T.AH_DATE < DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 1 DAY)
AND HM.HM_USE_YN = 'Y' AND HM.HM_MAIN_HOME != 'A' GROUP BY HM.HM_TILES
